headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex, no immediate downside) — JSW Energy commissions 3,800 TPA green hydrogen facility, enhancing renewable energy profile
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD disclosure obligations; no penalty or deadline risk.
No current P/E rerating; future green revenue could support margin expansion.
Potential for lower cost of capital via green financing; no immediate bond spread impact.
